steps.title: Find the first mean
steps.content:
Add the values in data set A and divide by $5$:
$$\frac{72+73+73+76+76}{5}=\frac{370}{5}=74$$

steps.title: Set the second mean equal
steps.content:
Data set B must also have mean $74$:
$$\frac{61+64+74+85+x}{5}=74$$
$$\frac{284+x}{5}=74$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing value
steps.content: Multiply by $5$, then subtract $284$: $$284+x=370$$ $$x=86$$ The answer is C.
